home.title: Today's Scenario
home.no_scenario: No scenario today yet. Check back soon!
home.offline_hint: You're offline. Your vote will be synced when you reconnect.
home.offline_voted: Your vote has been saved! Results will appear when you're back online.
home.verify_email_prompt: Please verify your email to start voting.

auth.check_email_hint: If an account exists, we sent a reset link.

settings.title: Settings
settings.delete_confirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.

gdpr.title: Your privacy
gdpr.body: SpicyPick uses analytics (PostHog) and crash reporting (Sentry) to improve your experience.
gdpr.bodyMuted: Analytics are anonymous and help us understand which features work. Crash reports help us fix bugs faster. You can change this anytime in Settings.
gdpr.accept_all_desc: Enables anonymous analytics (PostHog) and crash reporting (Sentry).
gdpr.essential_only_desc: Disables analytics. Crash reporting stays on so we can fix bugs.
gdpr.preferences_body: Choose how SpicyPick uses your data. You can change this anytime.

creator.title: Creator Mode
creator.instructions: Record your screen while reacting to today's scenario. Optimized for TikTok vertical format (9:16).
creator.vote_first: Vote on today's scenario first to unlock the verdict reveal!
creator.no_scenario: No scenario available today. Come back tomorrow!

packs.title: Themed Packs
packs.subtitle: Browse scenarios by theme
packs.no_scenarios: No scenarios in this pack yet
packs.premium_desc: Themed packs are available for Premium subscribers. Unlock to browse all categories and scenarios.

submission.success: Submitted! Your scenario is being reviewed.

premium.title: SpicyPick Premium
premium.unavailable_msg: Purchase system is not available at the moment.
premium.restored_msg: Your premium subscription has been restored.
premium.no_purchase_msg: No active subscription found to restore.

notifications.permission_denied: Notifications are disabled in system settings. Tap to open settings.
notifications.permission_unsupported: Push notifications are not available on this device.

guild.title: Guilds
guild.leave_confirm: Are you sure you want to leave this guild?
guild.no_guild: You're not in a guild yet
guild.no_guild_hint: Join an existing guild or create your own!
guild.leader_cannot_leave: Leaders cannot leave. Transfer leadership first.

prediction.title: Predict the Majority
prediction.subtitle: How do you think the community voted?

moralProfile.title: Your Moral Profile
moralProfile.notReady: Your moral profile is being built

demographics.title: Demographics
demographics.subtitle: Optional. Helps show how different groups voted. All data is anonymous.
demographics.selectFilter: Select a filter to see demographic breakdown
demographics.noData: Not enough data for this group yet
demographics.voteRequired: You must vote on this scenario first

premium.cta: Upgrade to Premium to see how different groups voted

demographics.deleteConfirm: This will remove your birth year, country, and gender. Your votes won't be affected.
demographics.privacyNote: Your data is only used for anonymous group statistics. Groups with fewer than 5 votes are hidden. You can delete this data anytime.

support.message_placeholder: Describe your issue or question in detail...
support.success_message: Thank you! We will get back to you soon.
support.error_message: Failed to send message. Please try again.

onboarding.slide1_title: Daily dilemmas that make you think
onboarding.slide1_subtitle: Every day a new moral scenario. Vote, reflect, and discover what the community thinks.
onboarding.slide2_subtitle: Pick your verdict — Guilty, Not Guilty, Complicated, or Both Wrong — and instantly see the breakdown.
onboarding.slide3_subtitle: Vote daily to keep your streak alive, earn XP, climb leagues, and unlock achievements.
onboarding.slide4_subtitle: Unlock expert analysis, bonus scenarios, and ad-free experience.
